'''bsl''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tree/goddess|tree/goddess]] (feminine)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tree/goddess|tree/goddess]] (feminine)
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæsilith|bæsilith]] || [[word:bæsilij|bæsilij]] || [[word:bæsilish|bæsilish]] || [[word:bæsili|bæsili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:basusuluth|basusuluth]] || [[word:basusuluj|basusuluj]] || [[word:basusulush|basusulush]] || [[word:basusulu|basusulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:basuluth|basuluth]] || [[word:basuluj|basuluj]] || [[word:basulush|basulush]] || [[word:basulu|basulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:basufluth|basufluth]] || [[word:basufluj|basufluj]] || [[word:basuflush|basuflush]] || [[word:basufluf|basufluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæseleth|bæseleth]] || [[word:bæselej|bæselej]] || [[word:bæselesh|bæselesh]] || [[word:bæsele|bæsele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:basosoloth|basosoloth]] || [[word:basosoloj|basosoloj]] || [[word:basosolosh|basosolosh]] || [[word:basosolo|basosolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:basoloth|basoloth]] || [[word:basoloj|basoloj]] || [[word:basolosh|basolosh]] || [[word:basolo|basolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:basofloth|basofloth]] || [[word:basofloj|basofloj]] || [[word:basoflosh|basoflosh]] || [[word:basoflof|basoflof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || — || — || — || [[word:basïflïf|basïflïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || — || — || — || [[word:basïfsïflïf|basïfsïflïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæsælæth|bæsælæth]] || [[word:bæsælæj|bæsælæj]] || [[word:bæsælæsh|bæsælæsh]] || [[word:bæsælæ|bæsælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:basasalath|basasalath]] || [[word:basasalaj|basasalaj]] || [[word:basasalash|basasalash]] || [[word:basasala|basasala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:basalath|basalath]] || [[word:basalaj|basalaj]] || [[word:basalash|basalash]] || [[word:basala|basala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:basaflath|basaflath]] || [[word:basaflaj|basaflaj]] || [[word:basaflash|basaflash]] || [[word:basaflaf|basaflaf]]
|}

''50 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:basalatha|basalatha]] || [[word:basalaja|basalaja]] || [[word:basalasha|basalasha]] || [[word:basalaka|basalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:basalath|basalath]] || [[word:basalaj|basalaj]] || [[word:basalash|basalash]] || [[word:basala|basala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:basalathal|basalathal]] || [[word:basalajal|basalajal]] || [[word:basalashal|basalashal]] || [[word:basalakal|basalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:basalathatha|basalathatha]] || [[word:basalajaja|basalajaja]] || [[word:basalashasha|basalashasha]] || [[word:basalaka|basalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:basalathan|basalathan]] || [[word:basalajan|basalajan]] || [[word:basalashan|basalashan]] || [[word:basalakan|basalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:basalathaoro|basalathaoro]] || [[word:basalajaoro|basalajaoro]] || [[word:basalashaoro|basalashaoro]] || [[word:basalakaoro|basalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
